name: python3-png
title: python3-png
description:
Pure Python PNG Reader/Writer (Python 3)
The PyPNG module implements support for PNG images. It reads and writes PNG
files with all allowable bit depths (1/2/4/8/16/24/32/48/64 bits per pixel) and
colour combinations: greyscale (1/2/4/8/16 bit); RGB, RGBA, LA (greyscale with
alpha) with 8/16 bits per channel; colour mapped images (1/2/4/8 bit).
Adam7 interlacing is supported for reading and writing. A number of optional
chunks can be specified (when writing) and understood (when reading): tRNS,
bKGD, gAMA.
.
PyPNG is not a high level toolkit for image processing (like PIL) and does not
aim at being a replacement or competitor. Its strength lies in fine-grained
extensive support of PNG features. It can also read and write Netpbm PAM files,
with a focus on its use as an intermediate format for implementing custom PNG
processing.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-png because Pure Python PNG Reader/Writer (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-png as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-png with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-png --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.why_to_use:
Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Pure Python PNG Reader/Writer (Python 3)
The PyPNG module implements support for PNG images. It reads and writes PNG

usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install pypng
Install with: sudo apt install pypng
